display_name: LIVE MEASUREMENT PROBE (piece 2/4 scaffolding, DORMANT: enabled=false). Exact strategy clone of champion_premium_tightexit for the paper->live fidelity probe — same filters/triggers/exit ladder/entry gate so it measures the SAME strategy. live_probe=true declares intent: when ENABLED + USE_JUPITER_ULTRA + a real private key are ALL set, the live-execution bridge (piece 1b) routes THIS bot's fills through MEV-protected Ultra swaps and instruments per-leg fill-vs-mid slippage. Tight exposure caps (max_concurrent 2, size sweep $20/$50/$100, daily-loss halt -$50, max 2 buys/token/day). Deliverable = live slippage dataset, NOT P&L. Do NOT enable without explicit approval + test_pre_live_invariants pass + MEV routing confirmed. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-02-live-measurement-probe-design.md
